rationale: Educ. Code §48.305 governs UIL allotments for non-enrolled students. It has no dependency on Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or property tax revenue.
quote: the district is entitled to an annual allotment of $1,500 per league activity in which the non-enrolled student participates.
_note: No relationship between this statute and the homestead exemption amount; no conflict detected.
